records.title: Sleep through the night — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: A library of soothing sounds helps light sleepers drown out household noise, traffic, and snoring. The Dreamegg D+ adds a warm night light and built-in alarm for a full sleep solution.

records.title: Block out noise and sleep deeper — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: The Dreamegg D+ plays calming sounds throughout the night to mask the disruptions that wake light sleepers. Comes with a gentle night light and alarm. Ideal sleep accessories uk for restless nights.

records.title: White noise for light sleepers — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: White noise and ambient sounds mask the background noise that ruins light sleep. The Dreamegg D+ includes a night light and alarm — everything you need for quieter nights. Under £31.

records.title: Wind down and fall asleep — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: Soothing sounds and a soft amber night light help anxious sleepers ease into rest. The Dreamegg D+ creates a gentle wind-down environment — with a built-in alarm so nothing gets left to chance.

records.title: Calm your mind at bedtime — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: The Dreamegg D+ combines gentle sound therapy with a warm night light, making bedtime feel less overwhelming for anxious or insomniac sleepers. Alarm included. Under £31 on Amazon.

records.title: Fall asleep without the worry — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: Build a calming bedtime routine with the Dreamegg D+. Soothing sounds, a soft night light, and a built-in alarm — simple tools that help anxious sleepers quiet a busy mind and fall asleep faster.

records.title: Better sleep structure — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine with Alarm
records.description: The Dreamegg D+ combines ambient sound masking, a calming night light, and a built-in alarm — giving restless sleepers a consistent bedside routine to anchor their nights and mornings.

records.title: Sleep better and wake right — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: Consistent ambient sound throughout the night paired with a built-in alarm helps restless sleepers find a rhythm. The Dreamegg D+ makes it easy to structure sleep without extra gadgets.

records.title: A steadier night's sleep — Dreamegg D+ Sound Machine
records.description: Ambient sound and a soft night light help restless sleepers settle into a calmer rhythm. The Dreamegg D+ adds a wake-up alarm so the whole night — start to finish — stays structured.
